summary:
Continuing the website build — the MCP tools aren't relevant to this task.
Continuing with lunch.html and site_intent.json.
Built the Maple Hollow Community Schools (MHCS) district website — a binder/notebook-themed K-12 site with a sunny pastel palette, dymo label headers, washi-tape accents, and a persistent left-rail binder nav across every page.

**Pages (8 HTML, including index.html at root):**
- `index.html` — Home with 3-zone layout: binder nav, sticker-card canvas (hero, quick tools, news mosaic, partners marquee), and This Week / bell schedule / weather right rail
- `our-schools.html` — Grid/Map view toggle, 7 mascot school cards, pin-overlay map, address lookup, enrollment stepper, open houses
- `portal.html` — Role-tabbed sign-in (Parent/Student/Staff) with SSO, feature showcase (Grades, Attendance, Lunch, Bus Tracker, Forms), mobile app + FERPA blocks
- `academics.html` — Grade-band tab strip, subject accordion (ELA/Math/Sci/SS/WL/Arts/PE/CTE), program spotlights, graduation pathways, testing calendar
- `calendar.html` — Month/Week/Agenda view switcher, color-coded grid, category pills, subscribe panel, selected-event flyout
- `board.html` — 7-member roster, next-meeting hero, searchable past-meetings table, policy library 1000–6000 accordion, strategic plan dashboard, public-comment modal
- `news.html` — Featured story + dated post list with thumbnails, sticker-pill category filter, newsletter signup, press kit, social grid
- `lunch.html` — Weekly Mon–Fri menu grid, school-level tabs, week navigator, allergen pictogram legend, free/reduced & farm-to-school cards

**Shared:**
- `css/style.css` — full pastel-binder theme (palette tokens, notebook ruled background, dymo labels, washi tape, sticker buttons, school cards, map canvas, modal, footer)
- `js/app.js` — view toggles, role tabs, modal open/close, calendar view switcher, news filter, locale toast, lunch week nav, alert rotator
- `site_intent.json` — describes the concept as implemented

All required text strings are present, the locale dropdown (en/es/vi/so) lives in the topbar of every page, and the binder nav highlights the active section per page.
